events.content: "Evidence": "Markdown files changed: spec.md, SKILL.md, REQ-008/DESIGN-008/TASK-008/INTERVIEW-1951, plan files, STEP-0-METRICS.md. Validated via taste-lints (0 errors per PR review summary). markdownlint not gating in this repo."

"detail": "Appended Check 9d (Prior Art / Constraints elicitation) to Step 9 pre-mortem list. 9d FAIL conditions: (a) section absent; (b) all 3 subsections empty without coverage note; (c) guard-string still present (Step 0.5 partial). Updated Step 9 narrative to reference 9a/9b/9c/9d. 9a/9b/9c bodies untouched per plan."

"detail": "Wrote tests/commands/step0_5_parser.py (compute_provisional_tier + section extractors) and tests/commands/test_spec_step0_5.py (S1-S12 plus parametrized parser cases). 30 tests pass. Fixed 8h-tier contradiction (REQ/DESIGN/spec.md prose): 8h is Tier 3 per mapping; parenthetical aligned. Mirrored Step 0.5 + 9d into Copilot CLI SKILL.md to preserve existing byte-identity tests; this resolves deferred-item early (originally out-of-scope per REQ-008). All 95 tests in tests/commands/ pass."

"detail": "REQ-008 implementation complete. 9 commits on feat/req-008-step-0-5-memory-first-gate. Spec.md grew from 199 to 339 lines; 12 ACs delivered; 107 tests pass; Copilot CLI mirror landed; plan tracked at .agents/plans/active/req-008-step-0-5-memory-first-gate.md. Ready for /review."

"detail": "PR 1980 surfaced 11 bot-review threads + 4 unique CI failures. Fixed: workflow regex bug filtering session logs (excluded STEP-0-METRICS.md tally); 9d FAIL clause de-tautologized (token referenced without literal HTML comment); .qualityrc.json encapsulation warn:3 inverted to warn:1; _extract_first_hours_estimate docstring corrected (regex picks last number in range, not first); _hours_to_tier docstring corrected (8h is Tier 3 per mapping); REQ-008 + DESIGN-008 security sections corrected (topic input is author-controlled not trusted; mandate argv-vector subprocess for CWE-78); has_guard_string used in test, paired with new test asserting 2B post-state. 132 tests pass."

"detail": "PR 1980 had 27 unresolved threads after second wave of bot reviews (gemini-code-assist, coderabbitai). Substantive fixes applied: episode event types test->milestone (CodeRabbit policy); episode metrics recomputed; INTERVIEW frontmatter expanded with required fields (type/id/priority/created/updated/related); REQ-008 category developer-experience->functional; TASK-008 complexity S->L (matches 9.5-14.5h range); marketplace.json description hardcoded counts removed; DESIGN-008 line 277 stale Copilot CLI twin status corrected to reflect M4 mirror; DESIGN-008 frontmatter related TASK-008 added; AC-10 contradictory text reconciled with formula (formula is canonical); halt-block parser strictness increased (exactly-5-lines, no duplicate keys, no free-form lines); 3 new tests added for parser strictness. 135 tests pass."

"detail": "PR 1980 5 new threads: spec.md normalization example contradicted rules (added leading-dot strip to rule 1); new_pr.py legacy .md session logs would fail JSON validator (extracted helper, warns + skips); test_s12_has_guard_string_returns_false_after_2b docstring contradicted earlier invariant (clarified token-name vs literal HTML comment); REQ-008 Security section softened to align with #1975 redaction follow-on. 170 tests pass."

"detail": "PR 1980 1 thread (devin-ai-integration): _extract_validatable_session_logs returned empty list when only .md session logs staged, calling code then printed misleading No session log found warning. Mini /spec/plan/build/test cycle: helper now returns tuple (logs, has_legacy_md); caller suppresses second warning when legacy .md present. New test covers behavior. 171 tests pass."

"detail": "PR 1980 4 threads (copilot bot): REQ-008 AC-08 Q0 typo fixed to Q1; spec.md tally format ISO-8601 tightened to canonical YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ to match parser; SKILL.md mirror updated; test docstring count inconsistency fixed (4 promoted of 14, 10 manual). 171 tests pass."

"detail": "PR 1980 6 CodeRabbit + 1 cursor findings: episode metadata corrected (outcome=success, task populated, metrics realistic, events relabeled milestone); DESIGN-008 fallback rule canonicalized (single max() formula); DESIGN-008 H11 trigger description aligned with per-mode threshold (human=2, auto=3); DESIGN-008 halt block YAML wrapper replaced with canonical fenced step0_5-halt format; DESIGN-008 tally line tightened to YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ; REQ-008 + TASK-008 Copilot CLI twin out-of-scope removed (mirror is required by byte-identity tests); spec.md memory skill invocation now mandates Skill(skill=memory) with argv-vector + topic-rejection fallbacks. 171 tests pass."

"detail": "Independent-thinker subagent found 2 HIGH: (1) spec.md AC-10 formula used undefined phases_run instead of phases_needed - fixed; (2) AC-11 archival policy ambiguous about rotation triggers - rewrote as ANY-OF list (100 entries OR 30-invocation review OR kill criterion). LOW-1 (leading space on line 339) was false positive. Updated S10 test to match. Re-ran adversarial: 0 BLOCKING, 0 HIGH issues remaining (HIGH-1 + HIGH-2 from prior pass closed). 135 tests pass."

"detail": "MED-1 cross-file Phase 5 vs Phase N drift: REQ-008 + spec.md correctly used Phase N (broader rule firing on Tier 2-3 upgrade too); DESIGN-008 + TASK-008 said Phase 5 only. Aligned all to Phase N. LOW-1 supplemental_phase_5_warranted helper renamed to supplemental_traversal_warranted (matches the broader rule it actually implements). 135 tests pass."

"detail": "4 LOW residuals (Phase 5 wording in places describing general rule): spec.md:174 trigger condition, spec.md:235 reference, spec.md:304 heading, REQ-008:37 Q4 wedge. Aligned all to traversal hook / phase boundary. Test S10 fixture string updated. 135 tests pass."

"detail": "F-01 HIGH: REQ-008 + DESIGN-008 said only H11 trigger; spec.md+parser have H6-H11 reflecting memory/SKILL.md BLOCKING change types. Reconciled to spec.md side: added AC-09a (H6-H10 memory-first triggers) and renamed AC-09 to AC-09b. Updated DESIGN-008 trigger-count row. F-04 LOW: 9d FAIL condition (c) is build-time guard not in REQ-008 AC-12; documented in REQ AC-12 as implementation-only safety. F-05 LOW: added phases_needed-literals assertions to S10 test. F-02/F-03/F-06/F-07 deferred (cosmetic). 135 tests pass."

"detail": "AC-09 split into AC-09a + AC-09b caused HIGH downstream churn (spec.md halt example, tests, DESIGN, TASK all hardcode AC-09). Reverted: AC-09 retains H11/blast-radius (the original definition); H6-H10 memory-first triggers are now AC-13 (new clause appended). Avoids renaming the wire-format check string. DESIGN-008 line 118 purpose updated to cite both AC-09 and AC-13. 135 tests pass."

"detail": "AC-13 added to REQ but not propagated to downstream artifacts. Fixed: DESIGN-008 Requirements-Addressed list now includes AC-13; coverage map row added; halt-line example duplicated for H6+AC-13. spec.md+SKILL.md halt-block format section now shows H11 example AND H6 example with AC-13 citation. TASK-008 acceptance checklist added H6-H10 trigger definition + deferral instruction + halt-block check field. 135 tests pass."
